input.command: kubectl get configmap skew-scripts -n spark-skew -o yaml 2>&1

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
data:
  run_skew.sh: |
    #!/bin/sh
    # Placeholder driver: a real benchmark would join orders against products
    # on product_id and report per-strategy elapsed time and skew ratio.
    echo "strategy=${STRATEGY:-baseline}"
    echo "skew_ratio=10x"
  skew_info.txt: |
    DATA SKEW BENCHMARK
    ===================
    datasets: orders (large), products (small), customers (medium)
    join_key: product_id
    hot_products: 1,2,3,4,5
    hot_share: 50% of all orders
    effect: some partitions are ~10x larger than others (stragglers)
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"run_skew.sh":"#!/bin/sh\n# Placeholder driver: a real benchmark would join orders against products\n# on product_id and report per-strategy elapsed time and skew ratio.\necho \"strategy=${STRATEGY:-baseline}\"\necho \"skew_ratio=10x\"\n","skew_info.txt":"DATA SKEW BENCHMARK\n===================\ndatasets: orders (large), products (small), customers (medium)\njoin_key: product_id\nhot_products: 1,2,3,4,5\nhot_share: 50% of all orders\neffect: some partitions are ~10x larger than others (stragglers)\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"skew-scripts","namespace":"spark-skew"}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-24T09:31:52Z"
  name: skew-scripts
  namespace: spark-skew

content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-skew-baseline","namespace":"spark-skew"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-skew","strategy":"baseline"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","set -e\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\necho \"STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)\"\necho \"\" | base64 -d \u003e /tmp/skew_baseline.py\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\\n  /tmp/skew_baseline.py\necho \"spark_skew_baseline_complete\"\n"],"env":[{"name":"STRATEGY","value":"baseline"}],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-skew","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"512Mi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"256Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-24T09:32:10Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-skew
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 6311012d-7354-429e-a7b9-1f609650fae3
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-skew-baseline
    controller-uid: 6311012d-7354-429e-a7b9-1f609650fae3
    job-name: spark-skew-baseline
    strategy: baseline
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
  resourceVersion: "979970"
  uid: 6311012d-7354-429e-a7b9-1f609650fae3
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 6311012d-7354-429e-a7b9-1f609650fae3
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 6311012d-7354-429e-a7b9-1f609650fae3
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        controller-uid: 6311012d-7354-429e-a7b9-1f609650fae3
        job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: baseline
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-skew
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  active: 1
  ready: 1
  startTime: "2026-06-24T09:32:10Z"
  terminating: 0
  uncountedTerminatedPods: {}

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "broadcast"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast small products table, avoids skewed shuffle)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

3	metadata:
4	  name: spark-skew-aqe
5	  namespace: spark-skew
6	spec:
7	  backoffLimit: 0

9	    metadata:
10	      labels:
11	        app: spark-skew
12	        strategy: aqe
13	    spec:
14	      serviceAccountName: spark

24	        - -c
25	        - |
26	          set -e
27	          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
28	          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (Adaptive Query Execution auto-splits skewed partitions)"
29	          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
30	          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
31	            --master local[2] \
32	            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \
33	            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \
34	            /tmp/skew_aqe.py

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "aqe"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (Adaptive Query Execution auto-splits skewed partitions)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "baseline"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

file.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 7077
    name: spark
  - port: 8080
    name: webui
  selector:
    app: spark-master
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-master
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-master
        component: master
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-master
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        ports:
        - containerPort: 7077
          name: spark
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: webui
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-worker
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-worker
        component: worker
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-worker
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        env:
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY
          value: "1G"
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_CORES
          value: "1"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: spark
  namespace: spark-skew
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: spark-role
  namespace: spark-skew
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods", "pods/log", "services", "configmaps", "persistentvolumeclaims", "secrets"]
  verbs: ["create", "get", "list", "watch", "delete", "update", "patch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: spark-role-binding
  namespace: spark-skew
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: spark-role
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: spark
  namespace: spark-skew

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  status_aqe=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-aqe -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Complete")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  status_bcast=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Complete")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$(date +%H:%M:%S) aqe=$status_aqe broadcast=$status_bcast"
  if [ "$status_aqe" = "True" ] && [ "$status_bcast" = "True" ]; then
    echo "Both jobs completed!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done
input.description: Poll until both broadcast and AQE jobs complete

description: Poll until both broadcast and AQE jobs complete
